objective: Add a second-phase Protocol Validation Layer that opens after clicking 'Generate Protocol', validates the generated proposal, highlights conflicts, confirms applied constraints, and lets the doctor approve or revise before export or Start Request.

entryTrigger.description: After protocol generation, users land on a validation screen before final export or submission.

hardConflicts: injectable protocol selected when user chose oral only
blend product included when user chose avoid blends
advanced protocol selected when simple protocol required
softConflicts: high total cost when budget-sensitive selected
too many products when high adherence required
sleep-sensitive case with potentially conflicting protocol tags

checks.label: Format Compatibility
checks.passCriteria: All included products compatible with selected format tolerance

checks.label: Contraindications Applied
checks.passCriteria: No selected contraindication is violated by chosen protocol

checks.label: Complexity Alignment
checks.passCriteria: Protocol burden matches selected complexity preference

checks.label: Duration Alignment
checks.passCriteria: Protocol duration is consistent with selected duration or clearly flagged

checks.label: Cost Alignment
checks.passCriteria: Estimated cost is shown and flagged if misaligned with budget sensitivity

statusModel.warning: Protocol may proceed with clinician review
statusModel.blocked: Protocol should be revised before proceeding
